content.tip: Call a lapsed donor today — not to ask for money, but just to say thank you. You'll be surprised how often that restarts a relationship.
content.quote: People don't give to charities. They give to people with causes.
content.motivation: Every conversation you have today could change someone's life. Pick up the phone.

content.tip: When writing a donor thank-you letter, mention something specific they funded. Vague gratitude is forgettable. Specific gratitude is not.
content.quote: We make a living by what we get. We make a life by what we give.
content.motivation: One genuine thank-you today could be worth ten future asks.

content.tip: Mid-value donors are your most underworked segment. Identify your top 20 recurring donors and make sure each one has heard from a real person this month.
content.quote: Fundraising is the gentle art of teaching the joy of giving.
content.motivation: The best time to steward a donor is before they think about leaving.
